headline.purpose: Brand title, settings titles, and toolbar headings.

title.purpose: Section headings, result titles, and framed component headings.

body.purpose: Dense explanatory copy, table cells, warnings, and notes.

label.purpose: Metadata, badges, status labels, and definition terms.

motion.name: state-only
motion.purpose: Use only for hover, focus, active, and panel state changes.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Primary action for project-level commands and active confirmations.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; height: 40px; padding: 0 16px; border: 1px solid #0f766e; border-radius: 7px; background: #0f766e; color: #ffffff; font: 750 13px Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #149186; border-color: #149186; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid rgb(15 118 110 / 22%); outline-offset: 1px; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Default utility action for apply, import, export, and report commands.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; height: 40px; padding: 0 16px; border: 1px solid #cfd8e3; border-radius: 7px; background: #ffffff; color: #293447; font: 720 13px Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { border-color: #b9c5d2; background: #f8fafc; } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid rgb(15 118 110 / 22%); outline-offset: 1px; border-color: #0f766e; } .ds-btn-secondary:disabled { color: #98a3b3; background: #f8fafc; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Text Field
components.description: Standard compact input field used across process, geometry, and pricing sections.
components.css: .ds-field { display: grid; gap: 6px; color: #384457; font: 680 13px Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-field input { width: 100%; height: 38px; padding: 0 10px; border: 1px solid #c9d3df; border-radius: 6px; background: #ffffff; color: #172033; font: inherit; } .ds-field input:focus { outline: 3px solid rgb(15 118 110 / 22%); outline-offset: 1px; border-color: #0f766e; }

components.name: Status Chip
components.description: Compact semantic badge for robust, narrow, invalid, and planned states.
components.css: .ds-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; height: 22px; padding: 2px 7px; border-radius: 999px; font: 820 12px Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; text-transform: capitalize; } .ds-chip-success { background: #e8f7ef; color: #15803d; } .ds-chip-warning { background: #fff4dc; color: #9a5b00; } .ds-chip-danger { background: #fee7e4; color: #b42318; }

components.name: Metric Tile
components.description: Dense output tile for numeric summaries inside the recommendation pane.
components.css: .ds-metric { display: grid; gap: 4px; min-width: 120px; padding: 10px; border: 1px solid #d7e0ea; border-radius: 8px; background: #ffffff; } .ds-metric span { color: #607086; font: 400 11px Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-metric strong { color: #18212f; font: 700 15px Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; }

components.name: Process Window
components.description: Framed output module for heat-treatment time and temperature recommendations.
components.html:
AustenitizeRobust
900 C

Review against furnace capability and validation data.
components.css: .ds-window { overflow: hidden; border: 1px solid #d7e0ea; border-radius: 8px; background: #ffffff; color: #172033; font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-window header { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; padding: 11px 12px; border-bottom: 1px solid #d7e0ea; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 820; } .ds-window header b { margin-left: auto; padding: 2px 7px; border-radius: 999px; background: #e8f7ef; color: #15803d; font-size: 12px; } .ds-window-main { padding: 13px 12px 6px; color: #0f4fb8; font-size: 25px; font-weight: 780; } .ds-window p { margin: 0; padding: 0 12px 13px; color: #607086; font-size: 12px; line-height: 1.4; }

components.name: Validation Item
components.description: Traceable checklist row for process validation and project review.
components.css: .ds-validation { display: grid; gap: 8px; padding: 10px; border: 1px solid #d7e0ea; border-radius: 7px; background: #fbfcfd; font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-validation label { display: grid; grid-template-columns: auto minmax(0, 1fr); gap: 8px; color: #2c394f; font-size: 13px; line-height: 1.4; } .ds-validation input { width: 16px; height: 16px; accent-color: #0f766e; } .ds-validation textarea { min-height: 58px; padding: 8px; border: 1px solid #c9d3df; border-radius: 6px; color: #172033; font-size: 12px; line-height: 1.4; } .ds-validation textarea:focus { outline: 3px solid rgb(15 118 110 / 22%); outline-offset: 1px; border-color: #0f766e; }

components.name: Report Panel
components.description: Printable report surface with sticky toolbar and modal lift.
components.html:
HTCalc Report

Quote Summary

Process source, quantity, weight, and price outputs are listed for review.
components.css: .ds-report { width: min(720px, 100%); background: #ffffff; color: #172033; box-shadow: 0 20px 50px rgb(15 23 42 / 22%); font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-report header { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; gap: 14px; padding: 14px 18px; border-bottom: 1px solid #dbe3ec; background: #ffffff; } .ds-report h2 { margin: 4px 0 0; font-size: 20px; } .ds-report button { height: 40px; padding: 0 16px; border: 1px solid #cfd8e3; border-radius: 7px; background: #ffffff; color: #293447; font-weight: 720; } .ds-report main { padding: 28px; } .ds-report h1 { margin: 0 0 16px; font-size: 28px; } .ds-report p { margin: 0; font-size: 13px; line-height: 1.5; }

narrative.overview: HTCalc is a dense product interface for technical review, not a marketing surface. It should feel like a calibrated engineering bench: quiet enough for repeated use, structured enough to trace assumptions, and explicit enough to make limits and validation burden visible. The visual system is restrained by design. White and near-white panels carry most of the surface, steel-gray dividers define structure, and Calibration Teal appears only for primary actions, active navigation, focus, and trusted status emphasis. The interface should never make calculations feel magical or opaque.
keyCharacteristics: Compact, predictable product UI with familiar controls.
Flat-by-default surfaces separated by borders and tonal layers.
Teal as a functional accent, not decoration.
Small, high-weight labels for scan speed.
Explicit warnings, validation checks, and report affordances.

rules.name: The One Accent Rule
rules.body: Calibration Teal is reserved for current selection, primary action, focus, and positive confidence signals. Do not introduce decorative accent colors.

rules.name: The Semantic Pair Rule
rules.body: Success, warning, and danger states must pair color with copy, icons, or labels so status never depends on color alone.

rules.name: The Dense Sans Rule
rules.body: Use the single sans family throughout. Do not add display fonts, serif accents, or decorative label treatments.

rules.name: The Weight Before Size Rule
rules.body: Increase weight before increasing type size in compact panels. Oversized headings make the workbench feel less operational.

rules.name: The Flat Workbench Rule
rules.body: Resting surfaces are flat. Use borders and neutral surface changes first; use shadows only when an element is physically above the workspace.

dos: Do preserve traceability by keeping assumptions, warnings, validation checks, and report actions visibly connected.
Do keep product surfaces compact, bordered, and operational.
Do use Calibration Teal for active selection, primary action, and focus only.
Do pair semantic color with text, icons, labels, or status copy.
Do keep keyboard focus visible on every interactive control.
donts: Don't use marketing-site polish, flashy dashboards, decorative motion, or gamified visuals.
Don't make calculations feel like a black-box AI recommender.
Don't introduce purple gradients, glassmorphism, bokeh/orb decoration, or oversized hero treatment.
Don't use shadows on ordinary cards or repeated panels.
Don't make the app feel like an accounting system, CRM, production traveler, or certification tool.
